mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, tools, max_memory_records, max_tool_invocations, ai_model_id, enable_thinking, ext_params, user_id FROM agents ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO agents (name, description, tools, max_memory_records, max_tool_invocations, ai_model_id, enable_thinking, ext_params, user_id) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{tools}, #{maxMemoryRecords}, #{maxToolInvocations}, #{aiModelId}, #{enableThinking}, #{extParams}, #{userId})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE agents SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, tools = #{tools}, max_memory_records = #{maxMemoryRecords}, max_tool_invocations = #{maxToolInvocations}, ai_model_id = #{aiModelId}, enable_thinking = #{enableThinking}, ext_params = #{extParams}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
